chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at the time of purchase.
synonyms: Individual product lines within a sales order.
a unit price at time of order
at least one Order Line Item
one or more Order Line Items
the price at the moment of ordering
unit price at time of order

entities_post_resolution.definition: The unique customer identifier column in the CUSTOMER_MASTER table of the e-commerce database.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset. | **Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID

entities_post_resolution.definition: Extended amount is the product of quantity and unit price.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Extended amount = quantity × unit price | **Key Attributes**: - Extended amount = quantity × unit price

entities_post_resolution.name: Line 1
entities_post_resolution.definition: Line 1 refers to a line item in an invoice listing 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each | - Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50

entities_post_resolution.name: Monetary Transaction That
entities_post_resolution.definition: A monetary transaction that settles the total amount due for a Sales Order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Description**: Monetary transactions settling order amounts. | **Definition**: The monetary transaction that settles the total amount due for a Sales Order.

entities_post_resolution.name: Physical Delivery Of
entities_post_resolution.definition: The process of physically delivering products from a warehouse to a customer's delivery address.
synonyms: Physical delivery of products to customers.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Description**: Physical delivery of products to customers. | **Definition**: The physical delivery of Products from a Warehouse to a Customer's delivery address.

entities_post_resolution.name: Region Code
entities_post_resolution.definition: STATUS_CODE is a string indicating the current state of an order (e.g., PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING/CONFIRMED/SHIPPED/DELIVERED/CANCELLED | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: Return Policy is the set of rules that allow customers to return products within a specified period for a full refund.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: This table stores core information about customers, including their contact details and account status.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about products available in the inventory, including identifiers, names, categories, pricing, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about product categories and their hierarchical relationships.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: This table stores header information for sales orders, including customer details, order dates, total amounts, status, and delivery information.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: This table stores detailed information about each product line item within customer orders, including quantities, prices, and total amounts for billing and inventory management.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about payments made for sales orders, including payment methods, amounts, statuses, and timestamps of confirmation and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about shipments, including shipment identifiers, associated order references, warehouse locations, shipment dates, tracking details, and current shipment status.
